name: Adolescent medicine
description: Adolescent medicine focuses on health problems in teenagers including hormones, growth, mood changes, injuries, and chronic illness.

name: Aerospace medicine
description: Aerospace medicine deals with health issues related to flying and air pressure such as motion sickness, oxygen problems, and fatigue.

name: Allergy and immunology
description: This field treats allergies, asthma, immune system disorders, chronic cough, rashes, and sinus problems.

name: Anesthesiology
description: Anesthesiology involves anesthesia, pain control, and monitoring patients during surgery.

name: Bariatrics
description: Bariatrics focuses on weight loss, obesity, metabolic problems, and nutrition guidance.

name: Cardiology
description: Cardiology treats heart and blood vessel issues such as chest pain, palpitations, high blood pressure, and heart disease.

name: Cardiothoracic surgery
description: Cardiothoracic surgery performs surgical treatment on the heart, lungs, and chest organs.

name: Child and adolescent psychiatry
description: This treats emotional, behavioral, and mental health problems in children and teenagers.

name: Clinical neurophysiology
description: Clinical neurophysiology studies nerve and brain activity, diagnosing seizures, neuropathy, and nerve pain.

name: Colorectal surgery
description: Colorectal surgery treats diseases of the colon, rectum, hemorrhoids, bowel problems, and cancers.

name: Dermatology
description: Dermatology treats skin, hair, and nail problems such as rashes, acne, itching, infections, and growths.

name: Developmental pediatrics
description: This focuses on childhood development issues such as ADHD, autism, and learning delays.

name: Emergency medicine
description: Emergency medicine handles urgent injuries, trauma, sudden illness, chest pain, fractures, and severe infections.

name: Endocrinology
description: Endocrinology treats hormone disorders like diabetes, thyroid problems, weight changes, and fatigue.

name: Family medicine
description: Family medicine provides general care for all ages including infections, fevers, chronic disease, and preventive health.

name: Forensic pathology
description: Forensic pathology determines causes of death through medical examination.

name: Forensic psychiatry
description: Forensic psychiatry evaluates mental health in legal and criminal situations.

name: Gastroenterology
description: Gastroenterology treats digestive issues like stomach pain, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, and liver disease.

name: General surgery
description: General surgery performs operations for abdominal, soft tissue, and emergency surgical conditions.

name: Geriatric psychiatry
description: Geriatric psychiatry focuses on mental health in older adults, including memory problems and mood disorders.

name: Geriatrics
description: Geriatrics cares for older adults with chronic illness, frailty, memory problems, and mobility issues.

name: Gynecologic oncology
description: Gynecologic oncology treats cancers of the female reproductive system.

name: Hematologic pathology
description: Hematologic pathology diagnoses blood disorders using laboratory analysis.

name: Hematology
description: Hematology treats blood diseases including anemia, clotting issues, leukemia, and bleeding disorders.

name: Infectious disease
description: Infectious disease treats bacterial, viral, and unusual infections, fevers, and long-lasting illness.

name: Intensive care medicine
description: ICU medicine treats critically ill patients who need life support and close monitoring.

name: Internal medicine
description: Internal medicine treats complex adult illnesses such as infections, lung issues, heart problems, and chronic disease.

name: Interventional radiology
description: This specialty performs minimally invasive procedures using imaging guidance.

name: Maternal-fetal medicine
description: Maternal-fetal medicine handles high-risk pregnancies and fetal complications.

name: Medical biochemistry
description: Medical biochemistry studies chemical processes in the body related to disease diagnosis.

name: Medical genetics
description: Medical genetics diagnoses inherited disorders and genetic conditions.

name: Medical oncology
description: Medical oncology treats cancer with medications such as chemotherapy and immunotherapy.

name: Neonatology
description: Neonatology treats newborn infants, especially premature or medically fragile babies.

name: Nephrology
description: Nephrology treats kidney disease, electrolyte problems, swelling, and kidney failure.

name: Neurology
description: Neurology treats brain and nerve problems such as headaches, seizures, numbness, weakness, and nerve pain.

name: Neuropathology
description: Neuropathology studies diseases of the brain and nerves using tissue analysis.

name: Neuropsychiatry
description: Neuropsychiatry treats mental and neurological disorders involving both brain function and behavior.

name: Neuroradiology
description: Neuroradiology uses imaging to diagnose brain, spinal cord, and nerve problems.

name: Neurosurgery
description: Neurosurgery performs surgery on the brain, spine, and nerves.

name: Nuclear medicine
description: Nuclear medicine uses radioactive substances for imaging and targeted treatment.

name: Obstetrics and gynecology
description: OB/GYN treats pregnancy, childbirth, menstrual issues, infertility, and female reproductive health.

name: Occupational medicine
description: Occupational medicine treats work-related injuries, strain, chemical exposure, and ergonomic issues.

name: Ophthalmology
description: Ophthalmology treats eye problems including vision loss, infections, cataracts, and injuries.

name: Oral and maxillofacial surgery
description: This performs surgery on the mouth, jaw, face, and teeth.

name: Orthopedic surgery
description: Orthopedics treats bones, joints, muscles, the spine, sports injuries, back pain, fractures, and arthritis.

name: Otorhinolaryngology
description: ENT treats ear, nose, throat, sinus, voice, and hearing problems.

name: Palliative care
description: Palliative care relieves symptoms and pain for patients with serious illness.

name: Pathology
description: Pathology studies tissues and fluids to diagnose diseases.

name: Pediatric allergy and immunology
description: This treats allergies, asthma, and immune problems in children.

name: Pediatric cardiology
description: Pediatric cardiology treats heart problems in children.

name: Pediatric emergency medicine
description: This focuses on emergency care for children.

name: Pediatric endocrinology
description: This treats hormone disorders in children such as diabetes and growth issues.

name: Pediatric gastroenterology
description: This treats digestive problems in children.

name: Pediatric hematology and oncology
description: This treats blood disorders and cancer in children.

name: Pediatric infectious disease
description: This treats complex infections in children.

name: Pediatric nephrology
description: This treats kidney problems in children.

name: Pediatric respiratory medicine
description: This treats lung and breathing problems in children including asthma and chronic cough.

name: Pediatric rheumatology
description: This treats autoimmune and joint issues in children.

name: Pediatric surgery
description: Pediatric surgery performs operations on infants and children.

name: Pediatrics
description: General pediatrics treats common childhood illnesses like fever, cough, infections, and stomach issues.

name: Physical medicine and rehabilitation
description: PM&R treats back pain, mobility issues, injuries, nerve pain, and restores physical function.

name: Plastic, reconstructive and aesthetic surgery
description: Plastic surgery repairs injuries and improves appearance after trauma or disease.

name: Psychiatry
description: Psychiatry treats mental health problems like anxiety, depression, mood changes, and sleep issues.

name: Public health
description: Public health deals with disease prevention, epidemics, and population health.

name: Pulmonology
description: Pulmonology treats lung and breathing problems such as asthma, chronic cough, pneumonia, and chest tightness.

name: Radiation oncology
description: Radiation oncology treats cancer using radiation therapy.

name: Radiology
description: Radiology uses imaging such as X-ray, CT, and MRI to diagnose disease.

name: Reproductive endocrinology and infertility
description: This treats infertility, hormone imbalance, and reproductive issues.

name: Rheumatology
description: Rheumatology treats joint pain, autoimmune disease, inflammation, and arthritis.

name: Sports medicine
description: Sports medicine treats injuries from exercise including sprains, strains, knee pain, and shoulder injuries.

name: Surgical oncology
description: Surgical oncology performs operations to remove cancer.

name: Thoracic surgery
description: Thoracic surgery treats lung, chest, and esophagus conditions.

name: Toxicology
description: Toxicology manages poisoning, overdoses, and exposure to toxic substances.

name: Transfusion medicine
description: Transfusion medicine manages blood transfusions and immune reactions.

name: Urology
description: Urology treats urinary problems, kidney stones, male reproductive issues, and bladder problems.

name: Vascular surgery
description: Vascular surgery treats blood vessel disease, poor circulation, and aneurysms.
